title: CRITICAL: build_oscore_aad missing request_piv bytes copy
close_reason: Fixed: Added missing memcpy of request_piv bytes after CBOR bstr header in build_oscore_aad. The code now correctly copies PIV bytes to the AAD buffer, matching the request_kid pattern. This fixes incorrect AAD computation that would cause encryption/decryption failures with correctly-implementing OSCORE peers.
